name: Hot & Sour Mushroom Soup (Tom Yum Het) #2
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb oyster mushrooms, trimmed and halved
1/4 lb straw mushrooms, trimmed and halved
2 serrano chilies, seeds removed, cut into thin strips
1 fresh lemon, zest from one-inch piece
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized saucepan, bring the chicken stock to a boil.
2. Add the oyster mushrooms and serrano chilies; cook over medium heat until the mushrooms are tender.
3. Tie the lemon grass and lime leaves (or zest) together in a cheesecloth bag and add to the soup.
4. Cook for about 5 minutes, then remove the cheesecloth bag.
5. Stir in the fresh lime juice and fish sauce.
6. Serve hot with steamed rice.
43 CALORIES PER SERVING: 4 G PROTEIN, 1 G FAT, 7 G CARBOHYDRATE; 397 MG SODIUM; I MG CHOLESTEROL.
